draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Ms. Nina Rostova's O-1 visa petition as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of AI-driven creative content production and technology integration. As a General Partner at Horizon Ventures (HvO), I have had the privilege of closely observing Ms. Rostova's remarkable talents and contributions to this field.

Horizon Ventures, commonly referred to as HvO, is a prominent venture capital firm based in Palo Alto, California. Founded in 2010 by Mark Albright and Ben Watson, the firm has established itself as a significant player in the technology investment landscape. HvO is known for its broad investment portfolio that spans various technology sectors, including software, consumer internet, enterprise software, and financial technology, among others. The firm invests in companies at all stages, from seed to late-stage ventures, and has been involved in funding some of the most notable tech companies in the industry.

As a General Partner at Horizon Ventures, I am deeply involved in the firm's investment activities and strategic decision-making. My role includes identifying and evaluating potential investment opportunities, working closely with portfolio companies to support their growth and development, and contributing to the overall direction of the firm. I bring extensive experience in the technology sector to this role, having previously served as the Chief Technology Officer and co-founder of Orion Networks, a pioneer in software-defined networking, which was acquired by StellarTech in 2012. My background also includes serving as the General Manager of the Networking and Security Business Unit at StellarTech, where I led the company's efforts in network virtualization and security.

Throughout my career, I have been deeply engaged with the startup ecosystem, both as an investor and as an entrepreneur. I have a strong track record of working with early-stage companies to help them scale and succeed, leveraging my technical expertise and industry knowledge to provide strategic guidance and support. This experience has given me a keen understanding of the qualities and capabilities that drive success in the technology sector, particularly in areas related to AI and innovative content production.

I first became acquainted with Ms. Rostova and her work through my role at Horizon Ventures, where we have had the opportunity to closely follow her impressive career trajectory and the groundbreaking work she has been doing in the field of AI-driven creative content production. As an investor and advisor to numerous technology startups, I have had the privilege of working with many talented entrepreneurs and innovators, but Ms. Rostova truly stands out as an exceptional individual with a unique blend of technical expertise, creative vision, and entrepreneurial acumen.

Ms. Rostova's background is both diverse and impressive. She began her career as a high-end fashion photographer, with editorials published in Vogue Magazine and experience as the creative development lead at Fresh Faces London. This early exposure to the creative industries provided her with a deep understanding of visual storytelling and brand aesthetics, skills that she has seamlessly integrated into her later work in technology and AI.

Her transition into the tech world was marked by her role as a Fractional Chief Technology/Product Officer for multiple firms from 2021 to 2023. During this time, she led a complete product redesign for a music streaming service with over 500,000 daily users, resulting in a 70% increase in song listens on mobile. She also overhauled the search and discovery features in a "unicorn" Gen Z social app with 20 million monthly active users, and conceptualized and designed the MVP app for a new venture-backed marketplace for geeky collectibles, run by influencers with a combined 1.2 million YouTube followers. Her ability to seamlessly integrate her creative background with her technical expertise has been a key factor in her success.

In 2024, Ms. Rostova co-founded Nebula, an AI-native entertainment studio and tech lab that is pioneering the future of creative production. As the CEO, she has been instrumental in securing over $50 million in Letters of Intent (LOIs) from major brands such as Leaf Water, Holland Harvest, Terrara, and Lavish. Under her leadership, Nebula has achieved viral success with over 25 million views and global media coverage for its early content releases. The company is currently in pre-production on a full-length TV series in partnership with Millstone Studios and is taking over the animation of the children's classic, Nature Tales.

Nebula's innovative approach to content creation leverages cutting-edge AI technology to produce high-quality, engaging content at scale. The company's unique blend of creativity and technology has positioned it as a leader in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI-driven content production. Ms. Rostova's ability to build and manage cross-functional teams across creative, technical, and business operations has been a driving force behind Nebula's success. Her visionary leadership and strategic acumen have enabled the company to push the boundaries of what is possible in the world of entertainment and media.

In addition to her role at Nebula, Ms. Rostova has continued to make significant contributions to the broader tech community. Her work as a Fractional Chief Technology/Product Officer for multiple firms from 2021 to 2023 has had a lasting impact on the companies she advised. She led a complete product redesign for a music streaming service with over 500,000 daily users, resulting in a 70% increase in song listens on mobile. She also overhauled the search and discovery features in a "unicorn" Gen Z social app with 20 million monthly active users and conceptualized and designed the MVP app for a new venture-backed marketplace for geeky collectibles, run by influencers with a combined 1.2 million YouTube followers. Her ability to seamlessly integrate her creative background with her technical expertise has been a key factor in her success.

Ms. Rostova's educational background further underscores her qualifications. She holds a Bachelor of Commerce in Marketing from Montréal University, with a minor in Computer Science. Her international studies at the University of Oxford and École Supérieure des Sciences Commerciales in Paris have provided her with a global perspective and a deep understanding of both the creative and technical aspects of her work.

Throughout her career, Ms. Rostova has demonstrated an extraordinary ability to drive innovation and achieve remarkable results. Her unique blend of creative vision, technical expertise, and entrepreneurial spirit has enabled her to make significant contributions to the fields of AI, technology, and entertainment. Her work at Nebula and her previous roles have not only advanced the state of the art in these fields but have also had a lasting impact on the companies and industries she has touched.

In conclusion, Ms. Nina Rostova is an extraordinary individual whose unique blend of creative vision, technical expertise, and entrepreneurial acumen has positioned her as a leader in the fields of AI-driven content production and technology innovation. Her remarkable achievements, from securing significant funding and partnerships for Nebula to driving transformative changes in the companies she has advised, underscore her ability to push the boundaries of what is possible and deliver outstanding results.

I have no doubt that Ms. Rostova will continue to make significant contributions to the technology and entertainment industries. Her visionary leadership and strategic acumen will undoubtedly propel her to even greater heights, and I am confident that she will continue to be a driving force for innovation and excellence.

I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Rostova for the O-1 visa. Her extraordinary abilities and accomplishments make her an invaluable asset to the United States, and I am certain that she will continue to make significant contributions to the fields of AI, technology, and entertainment.

Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification.

Sincerely,

Jonas Reid
General Partner
Horizon Ventures [email contact here]

Dear Sir or Madam:

 I am writing to provide my wholehearted recommendation for Ms. Nina Rostova's visa petition. Ms. Rostova is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of AI-driven creative content production and technology integration. As a General Partner at Horizon Ventures (HvO), I have had the privilege of closely observing Ms. Rostova's remarkable talents and contributions to this field. 
 
 Horizon Ventures, commonly referred to as HvO, is a prominent venture capital firm based in Palo Alto, California. Founded in 2010 by Mark Albright and Ben Watson, the firm has established itself as a significant player in the technology investment landscape. HvO is known for its broad investment portfolio that spans various technology sectors, including software, consumer internet, enterprise software, and financial technology, among others. The firm invests in companies at all stages, from seed to late-stage ventures, and has been involved in funding some of the most notable tech companies in the industry.

 As a General Partner at Horizon Ventures, I am deeply involved in the firm's investment activities and strategic decision-making. My role includes identifying and evaluating potential investment opportunities, working closely with portfolio companies to support their growth and development, and contributing to the overall direction of the firm.  Throughout my career, I have been deeply engaged with the startup ecosystem, both as an investor and as an entrepreneur. I have a strong track record of working with early-stage companies to help them scale and succeed, leveraging my technical expertise and industry knowledge to provide strategic guidance and support. This experience has given me a keen understanding of the qualities and capabilities that drive success in the technology sector, particularly in areas related to AI and innovative content production. 

 I first became acquainted with Ms. Rostova and her work through my role at Horizon Ventures, where we have had the opportunity to closely follow her impressive career trajectory and the groundbreaking work she has been doing in the field of AI-driven creative content production. As an investor and advisor to numerous technology startups, I have had the privilege of working with many talented entrepreneurs and innovators, but Ms. Rostova truly stands out as a remarkable individual with a unique blend of technical expertise, creative vision, and entrepreneurial acumen

 In 2024, Ms. Rostova co-founded Nebula, an AI-native entertainment studio and tech lab that is pioneering the future of creative production. As the CEO, she has been instrumental in securing over $50 million in Letters of Intent (LOIs) from major brands such as Leaf Water, Holland Harvest, Terrara, and Lavish. Under her leadership, Nebula has achieved viral success with over 25 million views and global media coverage for its early content releases. The company is currently in pre-production on a full-length TV series in partnership with Millstone Studios and is taking over the animation of a children's classic series.
 
 Nebula's innovative approach to content creation leverages cutting-edge AI technology to produce high-quality, engaging content at scale. The company's unique blend of creativity and technology has positioned it as a leader in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI-driven content production. Ms. Rostova's ability to build and manage cross-functional teams across creative, technical, and business operations has been a driving force behind Nebula's success. Her visionary leadership and strategic acumen have enabled the company to push the boundaries of what is possible in the world of entertainment and media.

	Before co-founding Nebula, Ms. Rostova played a pivotal role as the Co-founder and CTO of Snappix, where she demonstrated her remarkable technical and operational leadership. For the first few years, she single-handedly wrote all of the code and managed all advertising efforts, which led to Snappix achieving millions in revenue and expanding operations to six U.S. cities. Her resourcefulness and technical prowess laid the foundational infrastructure for Snappix's success, as she created an automated system from scratch for managing photographer recruitment, onboarding, and operations. This comprehensive platform enabled photographers to manage their schedules and uploads, while efficiently handling client interactions and financial procedures.
 
	In addition to her technical contributions, Ms. Rostova also led Snappix's marketing and product development efforts. Her strategic oversight of marketing initiatives included the allocation and management of millions of dollars in advertising budgets across the United States, crafting compelling creatives and strategies that significantly grew the company's revenues and operations. As Snappix expanded to over 60 U.S. cities, employing thousands of freelance photographers, Ms. Rostova built and managed a robust team to sustain and propel this growth. Her foresight in integrating AI efficiencies for editing and optimizing booking processes was ahead of its time, demonstrating her innovative approach that predated mainstream AI developments like ChatGPT. Her ability to orchestrate such complex technical, operational, and strategic elements was crucial in transforming Snappix into a flourishing enterprise.

 Throughout her career, Ms. Rostova has demonstrated an extraordinary ability to drive innovation and achieve remarkable results. Her unique blend of creative vision, technical expertise, and entrepreneurial spirit has enabled her to make significant contributions to the fields of AI, technology, and entertainment. Her work at Nebula and her previous roles have not only advanced the state of the art in these fields, but have also had a lasting impact on the companies and industries she has touched. 
 
	In conclusion, Ms. Rostova's compelling journey in AI-driven creative content and technology integration clearly underscores her status as an extraordinary talent. Her significant contributions at Nebula and Snappix demonstrate not only her innovative vision but also her ability to translate that vision into transformative business outcomes. Ms. Rostova's work exemplifies the kind of pioneering spirit and technical acumen that drive industries forward, strengthening both her personal legacy and the fields she influences. Her continued impact and leadership in technology and entertainment make her a valuable asset, poised to contribute substantially to any environment she engages with. I am confident that Ms. Rostova's presence in the United States will foster further innovation and success for both her professional ventures and the broader technological landscape.

 Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification.

Very truly yours,
 

Jonas Reid
General Partner
Horizon Ventures
[insert contact information]
